sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ طِفْلٌ صَغِيرٌ اسْمُهُ زَيْدٌ يُحِبُّ الطُّيُورَ.
sentences.translation: Bilo je jednom malo dijete po imenu Zejd koje je voljelo ptice.
sentences.translationEn: There was a small child named Zayd who loved birds.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ طَائِرًا صَغِيرًا وَحِيدًا عَلَى الأَرْضِ.
sentences.translation: Jednog dana je pronašao malu usamljenu pticu na zemlji.
sentences.translationEn: One day he found a small lonely bird on the ground.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَهُ فِي صُنْدُوقٍ دَافِئٍ وَأَعْطَاهُ مَاءً وَطَعَامًا.
sentences.translation: Stavio ga je u toplu kutiju i dao mu vodu i hranu.
sentences.translationEn: He put it in a warm box and gave it water and food.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أَيَّامٍ قَلِيلَةٍ طَارَ الطَّائِرُ وَزَيْدٌ يَبْتَسِمُ.
sentences.translation: Nakon nekoliko dana ptica je odletjela a Zejd se smiješio.
sentences.translationEn: After a few days the bird flew away while Zayd smiled.
